niche: Home decor, interior design, garden styling
description: WordPress blog curating home decorating ideas — living room, bedroom, kitchen, yard. Listicle-style content with curated images and practical styling tips. Pinterest-driven traffic model.

siteAssessment.design: Clean, professional, white/light theme with high-quality home decor imagery
siteAssessment.contentType: Listicle-style posts (e.g. '20+ Bright and Bold Summer Mantel Decorating Ideas')

assetsIncluded: Primary domain and all site content/files (homemadegraceful.com)

sellerQandA.julyDecline: Migrated from Mediavine to Ezoic — monetization gap during transition. Not traffic-related. Revenue recovered once Ezoic was fully serving ads.
sellerQandA.janDecline: Two factors: (1) Q4→Q1 seasonal RPM drop across ad industry, (2) Pinterest algorithm update caused traffic dip. Seller is diversifying to Facebook to reduce Pinterest reliance.
sellerQandA.employees: Runs entirely alone — no employees, no contractors. Handles content creation, Pinterest strategy, publishing, and all operations.
sellerQandA.training: UNANSWERED — but listing says 30 days email support

earningsAnalysis.trend: Hockey stick growth from $0 (Sep 24) to $4,500 peak (Oct 25)
earningsAnalysis.seasonal: Home decor peaks Aug-Oct (holiday decorating season), dips Jan-Feb
earningsAnalysis.adNetworkSwitch: Mediavine → Ezoic (July 2025), caused temporary revenue gap
earningsAnalysis.margin: 100% — zero operating costs (no tools, no contractors)

trafficAnalysis.growth: 0 to 150K+ page views in 2 years — 206% growth
trafficAnalysis.dependency: CRITICAL — 92% single platform dependency on Pinterest
trafficAnalysis.riskMitigation: Seller started Facebook presence but early stage

risks: Only 18 months old — limited track record
92% traffic from Pinterest — extreme single platform dependency
20hrs/week is a lot — needs VA to become passive
Mediavine 50K sessions/month minimum — Ezoic transfer may not carry over
Registered in Vietnam — potential business transfer complications
Many seller Q&As unanswered — gaps in due diligence
Seasonal revenue pattern — Jan-Feb dips significantly
opportunities: AI can write all content (home decor listicles are perfect for AI)
VA handles Pinterest pinning via Tailwind/scheduling tools
Build email list aggressively (only 400 subs currently — huge upside)
Add affiliate links (Amazon Associates for home products)
Expand to Facebook, Instagram, TikTok for traffic diversification
Seasonal content calendar can be pre-planned months ahead
100% margin means adding a £400/mo VA still leaves high profitability
